title: See Kanna Award-nominated rapper at museum
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Rapper \"Hakkiesdraad\" Hartman is performing at the Bartolomeu Dias Museum in Mossel Bay this Wednesday, 5 June.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Rapper \"Hakkiesdraad\" Hartman is performing at the Bartolomeu Dias Museum in Mossel Bay this Wednesday, 5 June."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is called The Lunchtime Show and will take place from 13:00 to 14:00 in the Maritime Museum.","html":"It is called The Lunchtime Show and will take place from 13:00 to 14:00 in the Maritime Museum."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Refreshments","html":"Refreshments"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Coffee, pies, samoosas and koeksusters can be bought from the coffee shop in the musuem.","html":"Coffee, pies, samoosas and koeksusters can be bought from the coffee shop in the musuem."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The cost of tickets for the show is only the usual entrance fee for the museum (R30: adults, R20: pensioners and students, R10: learners), payable at the museum door.","html":"The cost of tickets for the show is only the usual entrance fee for the museum (R30: adults, R20: pensioners and students, R10: learners), payable at the museum door."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nominated","html":"Nominated"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hakkiesdraad was nominated for a Kanna Award at the KKNK 2024.","html":"Hakkiesdraad was nominated for a Kanna Award at the KKNK 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Members of the public are urged to become friends of the Dias Museum. As a friend, you have free entry to the whole museum complex.","html":"Members of the public are urged to become friends of the Dias Museum. As a friend, you have free entry to the whole museum complex."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Friend of museum","html":"Friend of museum"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Become a friend or renew your membership by filling in a form and paying R20 per person per year at the Granary (reception) at the museum.","html":"Become a friend or renew your membership by filling in a form and paying R20 per person per year at the Granary (reception) at the museum."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Friends are welcome to visit the museum as often as they wish during museum hours by showing their friend membership card.","html":"Friends are welcome to visit the museum as often as they wish during museum hours by showing their friend membership card."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, call the museum (044 691 1067).","html":"For more information, call the museum (044 691 1067)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: See Kanna Award-nominated rapper at museum
